---
  title: "Stroop data 2019"
author: "Ethan Weed"
date: "9/17/2019"
output: html_document
---
  
  ```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


library(tidyverse)

rm(list = ls())

df <- read.csv("/Users/ethan/Google Drive/Teaching/2019_LaCoBra/experiments/Stroop task/Stroop_2019_a.csv", sep = ";")
df$Non.native.speaker. <- ifelse(df$Non.native.speaker. == "x", 1, 0)


df <- subset(df, df$Non.native.speaker. == 0)
df$Participant.ID <- NULL
df$Other.notes. <- NULL

df <- rename(df, list("Reading..no.int." = "RNI", "Naming..int." = "NI", "Naming..no.int." = "NNI", "Reading..int." = "RI"))

df_long <- gather(df, key = "Condition", value = "Time", -Non.native.speaker.)

ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Condition, y = Time, color = Condition)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_point()

#upper whisker = largest observation less than or equal to upper hinge + 1.5 * IQR
